entry.title: Re: SAP Companion - Guided Tour step automation issue
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

The only advice I can offer is to try to assign the GT step to a different HTML element.  If you move the mouse pointer, fractionally, when you are near the edge of the button, you may be able to pick up another element.  If you do that, perhaps the Click on Element function will work.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Using Postgresql Database in Cloud Application Programming model
entry.content:
This document explains the steps in configuring the PostgreSQL database in the cloud application programming model based on the CAP Documentation- Using PostgreSQL. 

 

Step 1: Initialise the CAP Server

Initialise the cap project using the command cds init in the root directory of the project folder.

Execute the command npm install to install the dependencies.

You can now start the cap server using the command cds watch. This will start the cap server on http://localhost:4004.

The service would now be empty without any entities defined.

 

Step 2: Entity Declaration

To add the entity definition, create a file called schema.cds in the db folder and define the following entity type.

namespace com.demo.timesheet;

using {cuid} from '@sap/cds/common';

entity Projects : cuid {
    project     : String(50);
    projectDesc : String(100);
    customer    : String(20);
    start_date  : Date;
    end_date    : Date;
}

 

Step 3: Service Definition

Create a service file to expose the entity. To create a service file, create a file named schema.cds in the folder srv and implement the following code to expose the entity.

using {com.demo.timesheet as timesheet} from '../db/schema';

service Projects {
    entity Projects as projection on timesheet.Projects;
    annotate Projects with @odata.draft.enabled;
}
 

Step 4: Set up PostgreSQL database.

Pre-requisite: Download and install the Docker Desktop on your machine.

Import the image for PostgreSQL database and supporting tool Adminer to access the database. To add the image, create a file named docker-compose.yaml and add the following services.

version: '3.1'

services:
  db:
    image: postgres:alpine
    restart: always
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 'postgres'
    ports:
      - '5432:5432'
  adminer:
    image: adminer
    restart: always
    ports:
      - 8080:8080

In the above yaml definition, we are adding import for two services .

  1. Create a container named db and in that container, import the image postgres:alpine. In the environment variable, set the password to access the PostgreSQL database as postgres. This will also be the username of the database. Some of the other environment variables you can set are. The postgres database runs on the port 5432.
    POSTGRES_USER : '<Username>'
    POSTGRES_PASSWORD: '<Password>'
    POSTGRES_DATABASE: '<Database>'
     2. Create a container named adminer and add the image adminer. The Adminer runs on the port 8080.

 

Step 5: Run the docker container.

To start the container, in the terminal navigate to the root folder of the application, where the docker-compose.yaml file is created.

Run the command docker compose up to start the docker container. Alternatively you can also run the command docker-compose -f pg.yml up -d 

-f : Provide the file name containing the docker services 

-d: Optional, run the container in the background and detached mode.

Open the docker desktop and you will able to see two new images created for the database postgres and adminer in the images section.

In the container section, you will be able to see the running container for the project.

Click on the hyperlink in the adminer instance to open the local host on port 8080.

In the adminer login page, enter the username as postgres and password as postgres to login to the database.

After login, you must now be able to see the databases available inside the container.

 

 

Step 6: Create a new database for the Project.

This step of creating the new database can be done at the time of instantiating the container itself by specifiying the environment variable POSTGRES_DATABASE in the docker-compose.yaml. In this exercise, we will create a database from the adminer.

Click on create database, and enter the name for database.

 

Step 7: Add postgres adapter plugin to CAP application.

To add postgres to the Cap application, execute the command

    cds add postgres
 

This step will add the plugin @cap-js/postgres to the dependencies.

For more information, refer to the link below:

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases-postgres

Note: In my project, the version of @sap/cds was at ^6.8.4. The @cap-js/postgres require the dependency of the @sap/cds to be ^7.x.x. I have upgraded the package to install the postgres db.

Execute the command npm install to install the dependent package @cap-js/postgres if it is not already installed to the node_modules.

Package.json

{
  "name": "cap-pg",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": "^7.9.0",
    "express": "^4",
    "latest": "^0.2.0",
    "@cap-js/postgres": "^1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "sqlite3": "^5.0.4"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds run"
  }
}
 

Step 8: Configure PostgreSQL Database

In the package.json or .cdsrc.json add the required configuration to connect to the PostgreSQL database.

{   
    "requires": {
        "db": {
            "kind": "postgres",
            "impl": "@cap-js/postgres",
            "credentials": {
                "host": "localhost",
                "port": 5432,
                "user": "postgres",
                "password": "postgres",
                "database": "Projects"
            }
        }
    }
}
 

To deploy the tables the postgres database, execute the command cds build and then cds deploy.

In the adminer, you can see the tables created in the database.

 

Step 9: Build and Deploy the service

Execute the following commands to build and deploy the application.

Set the endpoint where you want to deploy the service.

  cf api <endpoint>
 

Login and authenticate.

  cf login / cf login --sso
 

Add xsuaa to the application.

  cds add xsuaa
 

This step will create a file called xs-secuirty.json. Here you can define the roles and scopse needed for the application.

{
  "scopes": [],
  "attributes": [],
  "role-templates": []
}
 

Add the mta configuration file by executing the command cds add mta. This will create a file called mta.yaml and add the required configuration.

_schema-version: '3.1'
ID: cap-pg
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production
modules:
  - name: cap-pg-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      readiness-health-check-type: http
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv-api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: cap-pg-postgres
      - name: cap-pg-auth

  - name: cap-pg-postgres-deployer
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/pg
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      no-route: true
      no-start: true
      tasks:
        - name: deploy-to-postgresql
          command: npm start
    requires:
      - name: cap-pg-postgres

resources:
  - name: cap-pg-postgres
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: postgresql-db
      service-plan: trial
  - name: cap-pg-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: cap-pg-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: dedicated
 

Build the tar file by executing command mbt build.

Deploy the application by executing the command cf deploy mta_archives/<name of build>.

entry.title: Re: Subtracting the number of one wagetype from another when calling a PCR with PRT
entry.content: Hello - I'm curious if you had an issue with overtime that retros from the prior year but paid in current year? We have OT hours coming from December 2023, but not being paid until January 2024 and this is not being picked up as an exclusion. We also tried running payroll for period 1 of 2025 and it also does not consider OT hours from December 2024. We added the OSS notes and put our OT wage type in the rule suggested by the notes. It works for all periods in current year - it's just ignoring that retro amount.

entry.title: cds view not visible in sac in qual environnement but Ok in dev
entry.content:
Hi everybody.

I'm working in a system landscape with an on premise S/4 system (dev, qual, prod) and a single SAC tenant.

I've set up a cds view (with data from ACDOCA) and respected all prerequisites to make it visible for data import into SAC -> this is working fine in DEV, but the same CDS (transported to qual) is not visible when looking for it.

(by the way I'm new to CDS view building, but I've found some notes more or less relevant for this situation and tried to apply the fixes with no improvement)

The import connection seems to be set up the correct way (both dev and qual).

When I compare the prerequisites they looks the same between both environnement : 

- /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE t-code shows that in both case an alias system is there

- the ICF node seems active (both side)

- when I make a data preview in eclipse in both dev and qual I get records ...

Which other parameters could be misconfigured in qual ?

Any idea about the other checks I should perform ?

Thanks in advance & regards.

Guillaume P.

pageProxy.getAppClientData().<variable> = <some value>;

Application client data are being cleared during synchronization. Where should I store variables, if still need them after synchronization? But I do not need them when the user re-opens the mobile application.
Should I use appSettingsModule, even if it is persistent?

context.nativescript.appSettingsModule.setString(<key>, <value>);

entry.title: Global Running Day with SAP Community in Melbourne - Wednesday 5th June 2024
entry.content:
It is really great to see the number of #SAPCommunity events taking place - there have been SAP BTP Innovation days in the month of May, Mastering as well as SAUG events - not to mention the upcoming #Stammtisch #YarningCircle meet ups. We want to keep up the momentum in June by getting involved in the Global Running Day here in Melbourne. 

This year the #GlobalRunningDay will be held on Wednesday 5th June 2024 but you can run or walk virtually anytime between 1st June and 9th June so get ready to get your running shoes on. This will be our third SAP Community running event in Melbourne and I am so excited for this.

All SAP Community members are welcome and if you don’t want to run - you can walk or cycle!

The plan is to meet in the morning (just before 7.30am!) and run around the tan which is a very well known running track. As per the below diagram we will meet at the Pillars of Wisdom. The track is around 3.8km.

Map of the tan


A more detailed map is here:

Event Information

 

Date: Wednesday 5th June 2024

Time: 7:30am (AEST - Melbourne Time)

Activity: Run/Walk/Cycle around the tan

Come and Join Us! 
 

On The Day


On the day itself we would welcome everyone adding a comment on this post with a photo and running times (optional) using hashtags #GlobalRunningDay and #SAPCommunity.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Extraction Filter for M2S JCDS
entry.content:
Hello Niels

Your syntax of OBJNR = 'OR*' would be checking if there was an OBJNR literally equal to OR*. This is likely why 0 results are returned.

Instead, try looking to filter for OBJNR beginning with OR. The correct syntax would be OBJNR LIKE ‘OR%’.

entry.title: 浅析S/4HANA ERP云的新API支持批量资产报废 - （一）有收入报废场景
entry.content:
Contents

背景介绍... 1 

前提条件... 1 

测试场景... 1 

总结... 1 

准备资料... 1 

背景介绍

  • S/4HANA Cloud ERP云最新支持使用API来批量对固定资产的报废处理。
  • 利用此服务，可对有收入和无收入的资产报废进行批量过账。新 API 是 OData 版本 4 服务。它属于通信场景 SAP_COM_0563。
  • 通过该服务，您可以对以下交易进行过账：
  • 含收入的资产报废（不集成到应收账款）和
  • 无收入资产报废（例如在报废的情况下）
  • 此服务涵盖的交易与“过账资产报废” (F7107) 应用中的交易相对应。

前提条件

在Business Accelerator Hub搜索对应API，可以查询到API Fixed Asset – Post Asset Retirement 相关的Communication Scenario是Finance - Fixed Asset Integration(SAP_COM_0563)。

 

在公有云系统的APP通信安排里，创建对应的通信安排。

测试场景

以下是6个有收入报废场景的详细介绍，#后是关键字段的注释。后续还会有无收入报废场景的介绍。

有收入报废场景

1.     手工收入-完全报废

Payload代码如下，根据实际情况更改：

{

    "ReferenceDocumentItem": "000001",#一个资产报废是000001，第二个是000002，最多不超过000200；

    "BusinessTransactionType": "RA20",#业务交易类型，RA20代表有收入报废；RA21代表无收入报废；

    "CompanyCode": "1310",#公司代码

    "MasterFixedAsset": "60000000",#主资产编号

    "FixedAsset": "0",#资产子编号

    "DocumentDate": "2024-04-30",#日记账分录日期

    "PostingDate": "2024-04-30",#日记账过账日期

    "AssetValueDate": "2024-04-30",#资产起息日

    "FxdAstRetirementRevenueType": "1",#报废收入类型，1代表手工收入

    "AstRevenueAmountInTransCrcy": 5000,#收入金额

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnTransCrcy": "CNY", #对应下一个字段10（公司代码货币）对应的货币

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnCurrencyRole": "10", #10代表公司代码货币，

    "FixedAssetRetirementType": "1", #报废类型，1代表完全报废

    "AccountingDocumentHeaderText": "Post with revenue-Manual",#凭证抬头文本

    "DocumentItemText": "Complete Retirement"#凭证行项目文本

}

 成功运行结果示例如下：

{

    "@odata.context": "../$metadata#FixedAssetRetirement/$entity",

    "@odata.metadataEtag": "W/\"20240504182908\"",

    "FixedAssetPostingUUID": "f7a50ed1-d4ad-1eef-82ee-8f2b253a28a4",

    "ReferenceDocumentItem": "1",

    "CompanyCode": "1310",

    "MasterFixedAsset": "60000000",

    "FixedAsset": "0",

    "AssetClass": "3200",

    "DocumentDate": "2024-04-30",

    "PostingDate": "2024-04-30",

    "AssetValueDate": "2024-04-30",

    "BusinessTransactionType": "RA20",

    "DocumentReferenceID": "",

    "AccountingDocumentHeaderText": "Post with revenue-Manual",

    "FxdAstRetirementRevenueType": "1",

    "AstRevenueAmountInTransCrcy": 5000.00,

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnTransCrcy": "CNY",

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnCurrencyRole": "10",

    "FxdAstRevnDetnDeprArea": "0",

    "FixedAssetRetirementType": "1",

    "AstRtrmtAmtInTransCrcy": 0.00,

    "FxdAstRetirementTransCrcy": "",

    "FxdAstRetirementRatioInPercent": 0.00,

    "FxdAstRtrmtQuantityInBaseUnit": 0.000,

    "BaseUnitSAPCode": "",

    "BaseUnitISOCode": "",

    "FixedAssetYearOfAcqnCode": "",

    "AccountingDocumentType": "",

    "TradingPartner": "",

    "AssignmentReference": "",

    "DocumentItemText": "Complete Retirement",

    "SAP__Messages": []

}

运行的截屏如下：

2. 手工收入-部分报废（按金额）

Payload代码如下，根据实际情况更改：

 

{

    "ReferenceDocumentItem": "000001",

    "BusinessTransactionType": "RA20",

    "CompanyCode": "1310",

    "MasterFixedAsset": "60000001",

    "FixedAsset": "0",

    "DocumentDate": "2024-04-30",

    "PostingDate": "2024-04-30",

    "AssetValueDate": "2024-04-30",

    "FxdAstRetirementRevenueType": "1",#1代表手工收入

    "AstRevenueAmountInTransCrcy": 80,

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnTransCrcy": "CNY",

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnCurrencyRole": "10",

    "FixedAssetRetirementType": "2",#2代表部分报废（按金额）

    "AstRtrmtAmtInTransCrcy": 80,

    "FxdAstRetirementTransCrcy": "USD", #这里只能填写功能货币，如果没有配置功能货币，可以删除这一行；

 

    "FixedAssetYearOfAcqnCode": "1", #资产购置财年，1代表报废的当年购置，2代表报废的往年购置；

    "AccountingDocumentHeaderText": "Post with revenue-Manual",

    "AccountingDocumentType": ""

}

 成功运行结果示例如下：

{

    "@odata.context": "../$metadata#FixedAssetRetirement/$entity",

    "@odata.metadataEtag": "W/\"20240504182908\"",

    "FixedAssetPostingUUID": "f7a50ed1-d4ad-1eef-82ef-413a2ecf68a4",

    "ReferenceDocumentItem": "1",

    "CompanyCode": "1310",

    "MasterFixedAsset": "60000001",

    "FixedAsset": "0",

    "AssetClass": "3200",

    "DocumentDate": "2024-04-30",

    "PostingDate": "2024-04-30",

    "AssetValueDate": "2024-04-30",

    "BusinessTransactionType": "RA20",

    "DocumentReferenceID": "",

    "AccountingDocumentHeaderText": "Post with revenue-Manual",

    "FxdAstRetirementRevenueType": "1",

    "AstRevenueAmountInTransCrcy": 80.00,

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnTransCrcy": "CNY",

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnCurrencyRole": "10",

    "FxdAstRevnDetnDeprArea": "0",

    "FixedAssetRetirementType": "2",

    "AstRtrmtAmtInTransCrcy": 80.00,

    "FxdAstRetirementTransCrcy": "USD",

    "FxdAstRetirementRatioInPercent": 0.00,

    "FxdAstRtrmtQuantityInBaseUnit": 0.000,

    "BaseUnitSAPCode": "",

    "BaseUnitISOCode": "",

    "FixedAssetYearOfAcqnCode": "1",

    "AccountingDocumentType": "",

    "TradingPartner": "",

    "AssignmentReference": "",

    "DocumentItemText": "",

    "SAP__Messages": []

}

运行的截屏如下：

3.手工收入-部分报废（按百分比）

 

Payload代码如下，根据实际情况更改：

{

    "ReferenceDocumentItem": "000001",

    "AccountingDocumentHeaderText": "3.Partial Retirement",

    "AssetValueDate": "2024-04-30",

    "AstRevenueAmountInTransCrcy": 1000,

    "BusinessTransactionType": "RA20",

    "CompanyCode": "1310",

    "DocumentDate": "2024-04-30",

    "DocumentItemText": "3.Post with revenue-Manual",

    "FixedAsset": "0",

    "FixedAssetRetirementType": "3",#3代表部分报废（百分比）

    "FixedAssetYearOfAcqnCode": "1",#资产购置财年，1代表报废的当年购置，2代表报废的往年购置；

    "FxdAstRetirementRatioInPercent": 50,#报废百分比

    "FxdAstRetirementRevenueType": "1",

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnCurrencyRole": "10",

    "FxdAstRtrmtRevnTransCrcy": "CNY",

    "MasterFixedAsset": "60000002",

    "PostingDate": "2024-04-30"

}

entry.title: Re: Dynamically Changing Measures in Chart
entry.content:
Hi @tilted 

You don't want to use the same script in both the buttons, you create a function, 

In the function you input your scripts, then this function should be called when the button(s) are clicked the only changes will the parameters to the function if you have any, also am not sure of any way to emulate a button click in SAC, as the events available for a button are onClick & onLongPress, If you know the set of measures that you want your table in the second page to have then as I mentioned before on the button click in the first page, save those measures into a script variable and this variable be applied as filter to the table when the page containing the table is initialized.

entry.title: Re: handle multiple requests concurrently within a batch request
entry.content: Since I checked the $batch request handling mechanism, it can be processed in parallel. So I expect CAP can also handle it in the same way. especially more than 5 GETs request are in one $batch request.

Thanks,

Pankaja

entry.title: SAP分析云2024年第二季度更新介绍
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍 SAP 分析云 2024 年第二季度的季度发布 (QRC) 的新功能和增强功能。

在链接的视频中，SAP 产品专家将向您展示 2024 年第二季度的部分重点功能。

 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本 1.0.401，以利用所有数据采集类型。

您的代理需要1.0.75或以上版本，但以下情况除外：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库版本1.0.99
  • SAP Universe (UNX)版本1.0.91
  • SAP Business Warehouse (BW)版本1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View版本1.0.235
  • File Server版本1.0.248

更多详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

每季度发布更新时，都需要通过 SNOTES 更新 SAP BW 与 SAP 分析云的集成。这将确保 SAP BW 的后端和前端同步。要了解实施时需要哪些 SNOTES，请参阅 SAP Note 2541557 中所附的 XML 文件。

关于SAP BW 与 SAP 分析云集成的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2541557 以了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 与 SAP 分析云来实时访问 Universe 时的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921 以了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的“简易部署工具箱”。

  • 为避免下载旧版本，以及可能让用户面对 Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的不当绑定问题，只有三个最新版本可供下载。

关于云代理的版本变更管理细节，请参考 SAP Note 3264839。

 

更新亮点

  • 系统和服务管理
    • 共享公共文件和私有文件的管理级别控制 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 管理员对用户配置文件设置的集中控制 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 文件资源库的备份到期设置 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 按 OAuth 客户端执行目的和授权类型 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
  • 增强分析
    • “Just Ask”：自然语言查询 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
      • “Just Ask”管理员现在可以将标签分配到可搜索模型
    • 计划预测
      • 计划预测 - 在故事中展示预测区间 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 业务内容交付
    • 面向财务、商业和劳动力计划的业务内容包 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 数据发掘
    • 数据分析器－从表中复制单元格（Ctrl C）|（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 数据分析器－导出为 PDF 时设置适合页面宽度 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 数据分析器－数据分析器中支持工作区 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 计算对话框：语法突出显示
    • 在筛选行中对计算出的量值进行筛选 
    • 嵌入式对话故事筛选面板 
    • 生成器面板功能改进 
  • 数据集成
    • 支持面向供应链的 SAP 集成业务计划的实时数据连接 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 变量对话框－文本配置、设置面板等 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 支持 SAP Integrated Business Planning 连接类型的 x.509 证书 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 数据建模
    • 提供“单位”属性类型 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 启用分析引擎的优化方案编写器
  • 企业计划
    • 高级公式 – 分析模型作为源，使用链接函数 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 数据操作－用于轮询执行状态的故事 API |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 数据操作 - 在跟踪表中选择“仅显示叶项” | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 多步操作 – 从对话框中复制外部API的URL等信息  | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 多步操作 – 在多步操作参数中支持分析模型 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 计划流程管理 - 用于故事和分析应用的扩展API | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 计划流程管理 - 通知管理 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 计划流程管理 – 使用日历向导创建流程时能够包括子节点 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 计划触发器－更新了格式设置选项 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 版本管理 - 数据输入过程中动态扩展规划区域 | （SAP 路线图浏览器） | （博文）
    • 数据操作中跨模型复制步骤的数据清理
    • 数据操作 - 新增了日历用法的显示
  • Microsoft Office 集成
    • Microsoft Excel 加载项
      • 刷新选定功能 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
      • Microsoft Excel 中静态报表的格式设置
      • 重新设计设计窗格标题
      • 打开对话框中的最近使用列表
      • 自定义函数：GETVARIABLES
      • 支持 SAP BW 和 SAP S/4HANA 实时模型
      • 提示功能改进
      • 支持 Microsoft Excel 中基于自定义单元格公式（获取和设置数据）的离线模式 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 移动分析
    • 在 SAP Mobile Start 中集成 KPI 磁贴 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 故事设计
    • 设备预览功能中支持动态字体大小缩放 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 按成员筛选对话框 - 改进了值选择体验 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 优化（统一）故事体验 - 动态字体缩放、批量导出等 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
      • 增强将所有表内容导出到 Excel的功能
      • 将故事导出为 PDF 或 PPTX 时启用批量导出
      • 支持UQM 表的 CSV 和 Excel 导出
    • “其他”序列功能 - 查看其他数据点的前 N 项和后 N 项 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 在故事中重新指向模型 | （SAP路线图浏览器）|（博客）
    • 表 - 数值精度 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 表 - “总计”作为客户端计算的锚点或操作数 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 垂直筛选器面板 - 页面筛选器部分 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 通配符筛选器（不包括 SAP BW 和 SAP IBP）
    • 主题首选项中的新格式选项
    • 精简查看器的增量更新
    • 支持基于 SAP BW 二级结构的瀑布图
    • 提醒客户经典设计体验停用
  • 故事可扩展性
    • 组合微件（第二阶段） | （SAP路线图浏览器）
      • 综合增强：支持响应式布局
      • 组合：数据源重新定向
    • 通用模型的自定义微件支持 | （SAP路线图浏览器）|（博客）
    • 支持数据变化洞察的群发模式 | （SAP路线图浏览器）
    • “区段”微件功能弥补差距
  • 故事演示
    • 统一故事演示模式 | （SAP路线图浏览器）|（博客）

 

业务内容交付

面向财务、商业和劳动力计划的业务内容包

采用新的预构建数据模型和故事，减少实施 SAP 分析云时所花费的时间。

2024 年第 2 季度针对行业和业务线更新的软件包如下：（SAP路线图浏览器）

新的行业和业务线内容包：

  • 商业计划
  • 共同点净收入计划
  • 面向 SAP S/4HANA 的集成财务计划的跨模型功能
  • 面向 SAP S/4HANA 的组财务计划
  • 面向 SAP S/4HANA 的集成财务计划
  • 运营劳动力计划
  • SAP 分析云的可访问性模板
  • 贸易管理
  • 订单管理套件
  • SAP for Utilities
  • SAP 风险和保障管理

点击此处 ，了解 SAP 业务分析内容的更多信息。

 

数据发掘

数据分析器－从表中复制单元格（Ctrl C）

此新功能支持从数据分析器网格中进行复制操作。使用键盘快捷键 Ctrl + C，用户可以复制选定单元格和标题信息的原始格式，之后粘贴到所需目标支持数据。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

企业计划

数据操作－用于轮询执行状态的故事 API

用于主动查询数据操作状态的脚本 API：（SAP路线图浏览器）

  • 根据特定的执行 ID 返回数据操作状态
  • 基于相关数据操作完成情况建立执行依赖关系

 

计划流程管理 – 使用日历向导创建流程时能够包括子节点

增强日历向导任务生成，在选择动因维的父成员时自动为子成员生成事件（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和增强功能的高级概述。有关这些功能的更多详细信息，请访问 SAP 分析云帮助门户。您还可以访问 SAP 路线图浏览器查看 SAP 分析云即将推出的功能

entry.title: Re: When using Crystal Report in C#, a specific part of a...
entry.content:
Firstly what SP are you using?

Upgrade to SP 35 from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Note, if you are using VS 2022 you need to use the EXE for that version, below VS 2022 use the other installer.

Note also the EXE's are to integrate into VS, MSI packages are for distributing your app only.

I ping R&D to see if they can suggest anything.

Possibly .NET and this may work for you:

public System.Windows.Forms.ColorDepth ColorDepth { get; set; }
Member of System.Windows.Forms.ImageList

Don

entry.title: Re: Payment Listing applied AP Credit Note amount Query
entry.content:
Hi,

Check below:

SELECT T0."DocDate" AS "Payment Date", T0."DocNum" AS "Payment DocNum",
CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN 'PU'
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN 'JE'
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN 'PC'
END AS "DocType"
,CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN T3."DocDate"
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN T4."RefDate"
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN T5."DocDate"
END AS "DocDate"
,CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN T3."DocNum"
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN T4."Number"
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN T5."DocNum"
END AS "DocNum"
,T0."CardCode" , T0."CardName",
CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN T3."NumAtCard"
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN T4."Ref2"
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN T5."NumAtCard"
END AS "Ref Num",
CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN T0."TrsfrSum"
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN T0."TrsfrSum"
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN T0."TrsfrSum"*-1
END AS "Transfer Sum"
,T0."DocCurr",
CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN T0."TrsfrSumFC"
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN T0."TrsfrSumFC"
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN T0."TrsfrSumFC"*-1
END AS "Transfer Sum FC"
,
CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN T1."SumApplied"
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN T1."SumApplied"
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN T1."SumApplied"*-1
END AS "SumApplied", 
CASE
WHEN T1."InvType"=18 THEN T1."AppliedFC"
WHEN T1."InvType"=30 THEN T1."AppliedFC"
WHEN T1."InvType"=19 THEN T1."AppliedFC"*-1
END AS "AppliedFC"

FROM OVPM T0
INNER JOIN VPM2 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocNum"
LEFT JOIN VPM1 T2 ON T1."DocNum" = T2."DocNum"
LEFT JOIN OPCH T3 ON T1."DocEntry" = T3."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN OJDT T4 ON T1."DocEntry"= T4."TransId"
LEFT JOIN ORPC T5 ON T1."DocEntry" = T5."DocEntry"
WHERE T0."DocDate" >= [%0] AND T0."DocDate" <=[%1]

entry.title: Re: Character
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

I checked an SQL Server system and totals are NUMERIC(19,6) which is 19 numbers and then 6 decimal places.

I checked in a HANA system, the currency totals are DECIMAL(21,6) which means 21 characters and 6 decimals.

So you may end up going over those totals and having to break out the periods by date range or something to get them into Excel.

Mike

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to have the In-build translation featu...
entry.content:
Hi @Anna, 

@DirkManuel is right. If you export the entire package in the SCORM format, the Machine Translation will not work, as it's provided through the SAP Enable Now Manager.

However, there is one option (undocumented, of course; otherwise, it wouldn't be interesting) to make it work. We'll use the same trick SAP Enable Now utilizes to export content directly to SAP SuccessFactors LMS, but it should work with any LMS 🚀  .

So, export the course as a SCORM package. Then extract from the SCORM .zip file a single file called imsmanifest.xml

Open it with Notepad or Notepad++ and replace all occurrences of "index.html?" with the full published path to the content in your SAP Enable Now system. 

Example: Before/After

BeforeAfter

Then, archive the modified imsmanifest.xml into a separate .zip archive.

Upload this .zip archive as a SCORM package to your LMS.

The LMS should accept it. So, the course seems to be "published" in your LMS; however, the content will be played from your SAP Enable Now system, and the Machine Translation function will work. Also, you can keep updating your course in SAP Enable Now without re-publishing it to LMS.

See, I could run it in the SCORM Cloud, and the Machine Translation works. 😍

However, it has a limitation: the content tracking won't work. 😫 This limitation also applies to the "direct SCORM export to SAP SuccessFactors."

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new pipeline concept in Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Thanks for publishing this , but Why are we trying to make simple things complex? When there are so many useful things that SAP can do with SAP CI which are in queue since more than 2 years why are we working on things like this. 

SAP PO was very rigid and SAP CI simplified things to a great deal. This particular pipeline not only makes things more complex and rigid than SAP PO but also takes away all the flexibility. This will leave a consultant puzzled like they were while learning SAP PO. Of all the integration flows I have worked on  Interface determination are not needed for even 0.1 % of the scenarios. The problems this design claims to solve were already solved! This just packages those solution into a more rigid and complex setup.

  • Ensures decoupling and Exactly Once processing for asynchronous processing, also for split scenarios and in case of restart - JMS queue already ensures this this is nothing new
  • Provides sophisticated restart capabilities, i.e., automatic retries as well as manual retry options - Every JMS queue inherently provides restart capability I am afraid I cannot find the sophistication
  • Simplifies operations by separating errors into different generic queues separated by routing, mapping and receiver system delivery - Generic Queues? the default 30 queues that we get have a limit of 10GB if a customer choses to go live with these pipelines and route 90% of their integrations like (400-1000) through 8 queues and each queue has a max size of 300mb upto 90% of total queue size (9GB) than that will never work! Messages will overflow and will get lost. 
  • Requires lower number of JMS queues to take into account the resource limits of an SAP Integration Suite tenant which at the end also simplifies operations - We can use just 2 queues as well by writing more complex logic than this but using lesser number of queues without increasing queue size doesnt solve anything
  • Allows isolation and tuning of parallelization for individual receiver systems - this works in individual queues as well
  • Allows reusability of artifacts across multiple flows by using generic flow concept - Process direct has always existed and enabled generic flows
  • Simplifies integration flow model especially for content based router and recipient list scenarios - again increased complexity
  • Simplifies configuration on the backend sender side, e.g., just one ALE port on SAP S/4HANA system required - this was always an option by having a single port in we21 and then routing it to multiple iflows in SAP CI nothing new here

    SAP should address the low number of queues in Integration suite. If a customer is paying 6000$ for a license and then paying additional fee for the additional bandwidth which again goes in thousands SAP should remove a limit on default 30 queues. With memory being so cheap now a days restricting a tenant to 32 GB of logging space and 10GB of queues doesn't really cut it.

I tried twice importing the 2023 branch from SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight at ABAP-platform-2023 (github.com), using a downloaded zip file as our system is blocked by a firewall from connecting directly to github.com

I have documented my attempt and all the errors extensively here:

Failure to import 2023 Branch · Issue #36 · SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight (github.com)

Unfortunately, there is a disclaimer on the repo that there is no support for the Flight Reference Model.

However, the SAP Help suggests to customers to use this repo and abapGit to import it:

Downloading the ABAP Flight Reference Scenario | SAP Help Portal

(It is furthermore baffling to me how much SAP promotes and endorses abapGit when that is developed completely independently and without any support from SAP!).

entry.title: Re: Calling BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMIT from PO
entry.content:
Hello,

as you have mentioned S/4, you should consider to not use BAPIs anymore, as those are not "clean core" - use instead the released API:

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SALES_ORDER_SRV_0001

It should be available from Release 2020 FP2

There is a risk that a BAPI becomes deprecated or is not maintained with new features for new releases at a certain point in time.

If you want to stick on the BAPI, there is a way to generate an IDOC umbrella - i never did it myself, but just asked google and there a tons of tutorials round that. Then you deliver asynchronously from PI the data via IDOC to SAP and with this facade it's calling the BAPI - so you don't need to rework your logic - only rename the segments. A good example is SAP standard way on creating Purchase orders, where the IDOC interface is a rendered BAPI. 

Hope that helps you.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: Long-Term Planning functionality (LTP) in S/4HANA Clo...
entry.content:
Hello @SAPSupport 

That is a really bold statement to put pMRP and long term planning and very misleading.

pMRP lacks several functionalities that long term planning provides:

  • purchasing budging - with long term planning you can copy the planning results of raw (purchased) materials to Purchasing Information System - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/a0d3efbac8b14fc89b29bf47a1677c86/c173b6535fe6b74ce10000000a174cb4.html Purchasing Information System allows not only for the planning results analysis, but it also gathers actual data, so you can compare plan vs actual.
  • stock levels planning - long term planning results can be copied to Inventory Control https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/a0d3efbac8b14fc89b29bf47a1677c86/c473b6535fe6b74ce10000000a174cb4.html Similarly to PURCHIS, Inventory Control lets you analyze the planning results, but it also gathers actual inventory data, providing for plan vs actual tracking
  • integration with CO - long term planning results can be transferred to CO as activity type requirements https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/a0d3efbac8b14fc89b29bf47a1677c86/c773b6535fe6b74ce10000000a174cb4.html That is essential to know how much effort (man hours, machine hours) you need to realize your long term planning. Once you know activity type requirements you can calculate activity rates, that are essential to product cost calculation

Those features are not there in pMRP - can you export pMRP planning results of various scenarios to a S/4HANA standard planning tool and make plan vs actual comparisons there? As far as I know, pMRP is simply not integrated with purchasing planning, stock planning or Controlling. 

My understanding is that pMRP is more of a operational level planning tool, not master planning one. The way I see it S/4HANA lacks descent long term/master planning tools as those functions are transferred to IBP.

One more point, long term planning is included in the basic license. Is pMRP also comprised in the basic S/4HANA license or is it chargable separately?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Story will not load
entry.content:

We had a similar issue this week. We were able to solve it by opening the story on a different page by adding parameter "&page=3" to the URL. We had only one working page in our story so it could be that you try out a bit. Once the story opened in edit mode we were able to duplicate the non working pages and delete the original pages afterwards. Maybe it's worth a try if this procedure works on your story, too.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Alternative to Fiori and oData, Vue and Rest Api
entry.content:
Here is another example of Rest Call usage in Fiori.

In this example, we are making a rest get call to Binance to get current ticker price.

To learn how to create a Fiori SAP UI5 app in VSCode, you can read that blog post.

To avoid CORS errors, install cors-anywhere

 

npm i cors-anywhere

 

To run multiple scripts, install npm run all

 

npm install -g npm-run-all

 

Controller Code

 

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller",
    "sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel",
    "sap/m/MessageToast"
],
    /**
     *  {typeof sap.ui.core.mvc.Controller} Controller
     */
    function (Controller,JSONModel,MsgBox) {
        "use strict";

        return Controller.extend("com.blogspot.javafish.fiorirestapp.controller.ViewMain", {
            onInit: function () {
                this.fetchData("BTCUSDT");                
            },
            fetchData:function(symbol){
                var that = this;
                $.ajax({
                    type : "GET",
                    url : "http://localhost:8081/https://api.binance.com/api/v3/ticker/price?symbol=" + symbol,
                    contentType : "application/json",
                    dataType : "json",
                    success:function(respData) {
                        that.setViewData(respData);
                    }                    
                }).always(function(data,status,response){
                    //MsgBox.show("Data:" + data  + " Status:" + status + " Response:" + response); 
                });
            },
            getPriceForSymbol:function(){
                var modelData = this.getView().getModel().getData();
                let sym = "" + modelData.payload.symbol;
                sym = sym.toUpperCase(); 
                this.fetchData(sym);
            },
            setViewData:function(data){
                var oModel = new JSONModel();
                oModel.setData({
                    "payload":data 
                });
                this.getView().setModel(oModel);
            }
        });
    });

 

View File Code

 

<mvc:View xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:form="sap.ui.layout.form" controllerName="com.blogspot.javafish.fiorirestapp.controller.ViewMain"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" displayBlock="true"
    xmlns="sap.m">
    <Page id="page" title="{i18n>title}">
        <content>
        <form:SimpleForm id="_IDGenSimpleForm1" xmlns:sap.ui.layout.form="sap.ui.layout.form">
        <form:content>
            <core:Title text="Sample Form" id="lblHead"/>
            <Label text="Symbol" id="lblSymbol"></Label>
            <Input width="200px" id="txtSymbol" value="{/payload/symbol}"></Input>
            <Label text="Price" id="lblPrice"></Label>
            <Input width="200px" id="txtPrice" value="{/payload/price}"></Input>
        </form:content>
        </form:SimpleForm>
        <Button text="Get Price" icon="sap-icon://save" press="getPriceForSymbol" id="btnGetPrice"></Button>
        </content>
    </Page>
</mvc:View>

 

Cors-anywhere Proxy settings

 

// Listen on a specific host via the HOST environment variable
var host = process.env.HOST || '0.0.0.0';
// Listen on a specific port via the PORT environment variable
var port = process.env.PORT || 8081;
 
var cors_proxy = require('cors-anywhere');
cors_proxy.createServer({
    originWhitelist: [], // Allow all origins    
    requireHeader: ['Origin', '*'],
    removeHeaders: ['cookie', 'cookie2']
}).listen(port, host, function() {
    console.log('Running CORS Anywhere on ' + host + ':' + port);
});

 

Package Json

 

{
  "name": "fiorirestapp",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "private": true,
  "description": "A Fiori application.",
  "keywords": [
    "ui5",
    "openui5",
    "sapui5"
  ],
  "main": "webapp/index.html",
  "devDependencies": {
    "@sap/ux-ui5-tooling": "1",
    "@ui5/cli": "^3.10.1",
    "cors-anywhere": "^0.4.3"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "fiori run --open \"test/flpSandbox.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#comblogspotjavafishfiorirestapp-display\"",
    "start-local": "fiori run --config ./ui5-local.yaml --open \"test/flpSandbox.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#comblogspotjavafishfiorirestapp-display\"",
    "build": "ui5 build --config=ui5.yaml --clean-dest --dest dist",
    "deploy": "fiori verify",
    "deploy-config": "fiori add deploy-config",
    "start-noflp": "fiori run --open \"index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false\"",
    "start-variants-management": "fiori run --open \"preview.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false&fiori-tools-rta-mode=true&sap-ui-rta-skip-flex-validation=true#preview-app\"",
    "unit-tests": "fiori run --open 'test/unit/unitTests.qunit.html'",
    "int-tests": "fiori run --open 'test/integration/opaTests.qunit.html'",
    "proxy": "node proxy.js",
    "startall": "npm-run-all --parallel start proxy"
  },
  "ui5": {
    "dependencies": [
      "@sap/ux-ui5-tooling"
    ]
  },
  "sapuxLayer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
  "dependencies": {
    "cors-anywhere": "^0.4.4"
  }
}

 

To run the app, use start all script

npm run startall

Related Links

https://blog.surges.eu/cors-proxy-server-for-remote-odata-service-in-local-sapui5-dev/
https://www.npmjs.com/package/cors-anywhere

I wonder, why SAP insist on oData. While we can create very lean solutions with rest. 

Hope this helps.

Regards

Example: 

Order 1 : uncofirmed: 100 PC of Material A 

 

new stock: 103 PC of Material A are available 

BOP Should not run as the stock is not over 10% of the requirement. 

new stock: 7PC: --> Current stock: 110PC 

BOP now runs as the stock is over 10% of requirement 

Order1: Confirmed with 100 PC

entry.title: SAP Business ByDesign – What’s New 24.05
entry.content:
SAP Business ByDesign 24.05 is now ready!

SAP Business ByDesign 24.05  is now available and the SAP Business ByDesign What’s New blog gives you an overview about the most important new features of SAP Business ByDesign 24.05. These are the so called Focus Topics ().
For these Focus Topics, additional in-depth blogs and videos might be available - just click the link next to the Focus Topic in the What’s New blog.

To get an overview about all new features of SAP Business ByDesign in 24.05 please go to the What's New document.

Cross Topics

    •  
      New Starter Package for Wholesale Industry
      To speed-up the implementation the Wholesale industry Package for SAP Business ByDesign is now available (blog coming soon).

    • Searching for KBAs via KBA number
      Users now can quickly look up KBAs using their KBA ID in addition to text searches in Help Center or Enterprise Search.

    • Additional tiles to Home work center
      Users can now see the additional support related tiles under the Services and Support section for easier access to key information..

For detailed information about What’s New in the Cross Topics area, please click here.

Customer Relationship 
Management


 

 

    •  
      PSM enablement of Action and parameters in Customer Return
      Partners have now an option to create a solution for assigning a service order ID to the Customer Return through PDI solution.

    • PSM Enablement of the Action “Block” of planning area of Material
      Partners have now an option to block planning area via PDI solution or webservice or ODATA using "Block” action of planning area in the material master.
      .
For detailed information about What’s New in the Customer Relationship Management area, please click here.

Localization



 



    • Mexico
      New tax events for International Air TransportationEntity Identifier (LEI) – Mass Data Maintenance
      Supplier invoices and customer invoices can now be created with 2% and 4% tax rates and all such transactions will now be reported in the 'Periodic VAT Returns' and 'A-29 Report' tax returns for Mexico.

For detailed information about all country/region-specific features, please click here.

Solution Extensions



 


    • NobleQ – Sales Commission
      Beneficiaries can be rewarded based on their sales performance, thus allowing you to recognize talent, reward achievements and conflict management.

    • all4cloud – procure4cloud
      Integration of SAP Business ByDesign with SAP Ariba enabling automatice transfer of orders generated in SAP Ariba to SAP Business ByDesign and back incl. order confirmations and invoices.

    • Stretch AB– Localization Sweden
      The localization solution for Sweden supports local requirements such as tax report, payment file, bank statement, EC sales list, SIE, Supplier invoice accrual and automatic exchange rate update (SAP store).

    • Snap Int – SAF-T: Report Solution for Romania
      Ensure tax compliance with SAF-T Reporting Solution, tailor-made for Romania's tax system. Whether you are a local entity or a VAT-registered non-resident company, Snap Int SAF-T solution seamlessly integrates with SAP Business ByDesign, providing a comprehensive tool for the new tax reporting standards mandated from January 2022.
      .

The Partner innovation roadmap information is regularly update in this blog.

entry.title: Re: UI5 Build Error when deploying to SAPUI5 ABAP Repo
entry.content:
Repository npm.sap.com has retired in Feb 2022. See note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3109201

If you have .npmrc file for your project, make sure to remove any reference to this repository.  It might be that you have an old package-lock.json file holding this old value. In this case, you can try to delete it and re-build.

entry.title: Re: HTTP Status 404 - not found error into integration fr...
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290

If it was working fine before and suddenly you faced this issue then please check if port 8080 and 8443 are blocked ?

Try to access B1if using using below URLs from Integration server browser:

 https://b1if server address:8443  

http://b1if server address:8080

If issue is with fresh installation, kindly perform clean reinstall with below steps:

1. Uninstall the Integration Component from control panel
2. Clean up the folder %temp%
3. Delete the folder, where the integration component were previously installed, if it exists
4. Delete B1if / IFSERV database schema
5. Remove antivirus and firewall protection
6. Remove the Java from add-removeprograms section, if exists
7. Delete the hidden folder named "Zero G Registry" in "C:\Program Files (x86)\".
If you do notsee this folder, change the settings in Windows Explorer to show hidden files/folders
8. Open Windows Registry and delete thekey folders below:
----
32-bit server: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\Business One Integration
32-bit server:HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Apache Software Foundation\Procrun 2.0\Tomcatx
----
64-bit server:HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\SAP\Business One Integration
64-bit server:HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Apache Software Foundation\Procrun 2.0\Tomcat6
System variables list.
10. From SQLServer Management Studio, go to SBOCOMMON database and delete/truncate all records from these 3 tables: SLSP, SLSPP, and SEVT.
11. Reboot the computer
12. Install the Integration component again
13. Restart the Integration service.

If still having issue, please create incident using component SBO-INT-B1IF.

Thank You.
Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: TOTAL CONSUMPTION VS SALES QUERY
entry.content:
Hi Brad,

The way you are joining the tables will limit your data.  Say there are invoices on days with no production orders, those will be lost.

I used a CTE table setup here:

-- DECLARE VARIABLES

DECLARE @Date1 DATETIME
DECLARE @Date2 DATETIME
 
SET @Date1 = (SELECT MIN(S0.[DocDate]) FROM OINM S0 WHERE S0.[DocDate] >= '[%0]');
SET @Date2 = (SELECT MAX(S1.[DocDate]) FROM OINM S1 WHERE S1.[DocDate] <= '[%1]');

-- DEFINE TABLE

WITH ConsumptionData AS
(		
SELECT 
	 D0.[ItemCode]
	,D0.[DocDate] AS 'Date'
	,D0.[Quantity] AS 'Sold'
	,0 AS 'Issued'
	,D0.[Quantity] AS 'Combined'
FROM
	INV1 D0 WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN OINV D1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON D0.[DocEntry] = D1.[DocEntry]
WHERE D1.[CANCELED] = 'N'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
	 D0.[ItemCode]
	,D0.[DocDate] AS 'Date'
	,D0.[Quantity] * -1 AS 'Sold'
	,0 AS 'Issued'
	,D0.[Quantity] * -1 AS 'Combined'
FROM
	RIN1 D0 WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN ORIN D1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON D0.[DocEntry] = D1.[DocEntry]
WHERE D1.[CANCELED] = 'N'

UNION ALL

SELECT
	 D0.[ItemCode]
	,D1.[PostDate] AS 'Date'
	,0 AS 'Sold'
	,D0.[IssuedQty] AS 'Issued'
	,D0.[IssuedQty] AS 'Combined'
FROM
	WOR1 D0 WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN OWOR D1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON D0.[DocEntry] = D1.[DocEntry] 
WHERE D1.[Status] IN ('R', 'L')
)

-- PULL DATA

SELECT
	 T0.[ItemCode]
	,T0.[ItemName]
	,ISNULL(SUM(X.[Issued]),0) AS 'Consumed In Production'
	,ISNULL(SUM(X.[Sold]),0) AS 'Sold Quantity'
	,ISNULL(SUM(X.[Combined]),0) AS 'Total Consumption'

FROM
	OITM T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
	LEFT JOIN ConsumptionData X ON T0.[ItemCode] = X.[ItemCode]

WHERE X.[Date] BETWEEN @Date1 AND @Date2

GROUP BY T0.[ItemCode], T0.[ItemName]

ORDER BY T0.[ItemCode]

You can also use a derived table:

-- DECLARE VARIABLES

DECLARE @Date1 DATETIME
DECLARE @Date2 DATETIME
 
SET @Date1 = (SELECT MIN(S0.[DocDate]) FROM OINM S0 WHERE S0.[DocDate] >= '[%0]')
SET @Date2 = (SELECT MAX(S1.[DocDate]) FROM OINM S1 WHERE S1.[DocDate] <= '[%1]')

-- PULL DATA

SELECT
	 T0.[ItemCode]
	,T0.[ItemName]
	,ISNULL(SUM(X.[Issued]),0) AS 'Consumed In Production'
	,ISNULL(SUM(X.[Sold]),0) AS 'Sold Quantity'
	,ISNULL(SUM(X.[Combined]),0) AS 'Total Consumption'

FROM
	OITM T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
	LEFT JOIN (
		SELECT 
			 D0.[ItemCode]
			,D0.[DocDate] AS 'Date'
			,D0.[Quantity] AS 'Sold'
			,0 AS 'Issued'
			,D0.[Quantity] AS 'Combined'
		FROM
			INV1 D0 WITH (NOLOCK)
			INNER JOIN OINV D1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON D0.[DocEntry] = D1.[DocEntry]
		WHERE D1.[CANCELED] = 'N'

		UNION ALL

		SELECT 
			 D0.[ItemCode]
			,D0.[DocDate] AS 'Date'
			,D0.[Quantity] * -1 AS 'Sold'
			,0 AS 'Issued'
			,D0.[Quantity] * -1 AS 'Combined'
		FROM
			RIN1 D0 WITH (NOLOCK)
			INNER JOIN ORIN D1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON D0.[DocEntry] = D1.[DocEntry]
		WHERE D1.[CANCELED] = 'N'

		UNION ALL

		SELECT
			 D0.[ItemCode]
			,D1.[PostDate] AS 'Date'
			,0 AS 'Sold'
			,D0.[IssuedQty] AS 'Issued'
			,D0.[IssuedQty] AS 'Combined'
		FROM
			WOR1 D0 WITH (NOLOCK)
			INNER JOIN OWOR D1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON D0.[DocEntry] = D1.[DocEntry] 
		WHERE D1.[Status] IN ('R', 'L')
	) X ON T0.[ItemCode] = X.[ItemCode]

WHERE X.[Date] BETWEEN @Date1 AND @Date2

GROUP BY T0.[ItemCode], T0.[ItemName]

ORDER BY T0.[ItemCode]

Both are roughly the same but slightly different structures.  I just stacked the three sets of rows and then group them at the end.

I hope you can follow what I'm doing.  I also added in credit notes.  But you can remove that part if you don't want it there.

I tested these and they seem to do what you want, you could further filter the item list.  The way I did it you would still get zero quantity items to give you a full list even if something wasn't consumed.  But you could just INNER join the data table or add a filter as needed.

Let me know if this does what you need,

Mike
